definition: A portal of entry into a building, room, or vehicle, consisting of a rigid plane movable on a hinge. Doors are frequently made of wood or metal. May have a handle to help open and close, a latch to hold the door closed and a lock that ensures the door cannot be opened without the key.
example: I knocked on the vice president's door
exampleVi: Tôi gõ cửa phòng phó chủ tịch

definition: The inedible parts of a grain-producing plant.
example: To separate out the chaff, early cultures tossed baskets of grain into the air and let the wind blow away the lighter chaff.
exampleVi: Để tách trấu ra, các nền văn hóa ban đầu đã ném những giỏ ngũ cốc lên không trung và để gió thổi bay những trấu nhẹ hơn.

definition: A rampart of earth, stones etc. built up for defensive purposes.
example: We need to understand the concept of wall.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bức tường.

definition: The interior bottom or surface of a house or building; the supporting surface of a room.
example: The room has a wooden floor.
exampleVi: Phòng có sàn gỗ.

definition: To line or finish (a surface, such as a wall), with plaster, stucco, thin boards, or similar.
example: We need to understand the concept of ceiling.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về trần nhà.

definition: The external covering at the top of a building.
example: The roof was blown off by the tornado.
exampleVi: Mái nhà bị lốc xoáy thổi bay.

definition: Opportunity or scope (to do something).
example: We need to understand the concept of room.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về phòng.

definition: A room in a house where a bed is kept for sleeping.
example: Please don't enter my bedroom without knocking.
exampleVi: Làm ơn đừng vào phòng ngủ của tôi mà không gõ cửa.

definition: A room containing a shower and/or bathtub, and (typically but not necessarily) a toilet.
example: We need to understand the concept of bathroom.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về phòng tắm.

definition: A room or area for preparing food.
example: We need to understand the concept of kitchen.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bếp.

definition: To be alive; to have life.
example: He's not expected to live for more than a few months.
exampleVi: Dự kiến ​​anh ta sẽ không thể sống quá vài tháng.

definition: An outdoor area containing one or more types of plants, usually plants grown for food or ornamental purposes.
example: a vegetable garden  a flower garden
exampleVi: vườn rau, vườn hoa

definition: Large movable item(s), usually in a room, which enhance(s) the room's characteristics, functionally or decoratively.
example: A chair is furniture. Sofas are also furniture.
exampleVi: Một chiếc ghế là đồ nội thất. Ghế sofa cũng là đồ nội thất.

definition: Furniture with a top surface to accommodate a variety of uses.
example: We need to understand the concept of table.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bảng.

definition: An item of furniture used to sit on or in, comprising a seat, legs, back, and sometimes arm rests, for use by one person. Compare stool, couch, sofa, settee, loveseat and bench.
example: All I need to weather a snowstorm is hot coffee, a warm fire, a good book and a comfortable chair.
exampleVi: Tất cả những gì tôi cần để vượt qua cơn bão tuyết là cà phê nóng, lửa ấm, một cuốn sách hay và một chiếc ghế êm ái.

definition: A raised area of a building's floor, usually covered with carpeting, used for sitting.
example: We need to understand the concept of sofa.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu rõ khái niệm về ghế sofa.

definition: A piece of furniture, usually flat and soft, on which to rest or sleep.
example:
My cat often sleeps on my bed.
I keep a glass of water next to my bed when I sleep.
exampleVi:
Con mèo của tôi thường ngủ trên giường của tôi.
Tôi để một cốc nước cạnh giường khi ngủ.

definition: A table, frame, or case, in past centuries usually with a sloping top but now usually with a flat top, for the use of writers and readers. It often has a drawer or repository underneath.
example: We need to understand the concept of desk.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bàn làm việc.

definition: Any private area, (particularly) bowers in the open air.
example: We need to understand the concept of closet.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về tủ quần áo.

definition: A storage closet either separate from, or built into, a wall.
example: We need to understand the concept of cabinet.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu rõ khái niệm tủ.

definition: A flat, rigid structure, fixed at right angles to a wall or forming a part of a cabinet, desk etc., and used to support, store or display objects.
example: We need to understand the concept of shelf.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về kệ.

definition: A device that generates heat, light or other radiation. Especially an electric light bulb.
example: We need to understand the concept of lamp.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về đèn.

definition: A fabric used as a complete floor covering.
example: We need to understand the concept of carpet.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về thảm.

definition: A smooth surface, usually made of glass with reflective material painted on the underside, that reflects light so as to give an image of what is in front of it.
example: I had a look in the mirror to see if the blood had come off my face.
exampleVi: Tôi nhìn vào gương để xem máu có chảy ra khỏi mặt không.

definition: A basin used for holding water for washing.
example: We need to understand the concept of sink.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bồn rửa.

definition: A brief fall of precipitation (spell of rain, or a similar fall of snow, sleet, or cascade).
example: Today there will be frequent showers and some sunny spells.
exampleVi: Hôm nay sẽ có mưa rào thường xuyên và có vài đợt nắng.

definition: A covering of linen, silk, or tapestry, spread over a dressing table in a chamber or dressing room.
example: We need to understand the concept of toilet.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về nhà vệ sinh.

definition: A refrigerator.
example: We need to understand the concept of fridge.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về tủ lạnh.

definition: A heater, a closed apparatus to burn fuel for the warming of a room.
example: We need to understand the concept of stove.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bếp lò.

definition: A chamber used for baking or heating.
example: We need to understand the concept of oven.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về lò nướng.

definition: a device or piece of equipment designed to perform a specific task, typically in the home.
example: The new appliance in the kitchen has significantly reduced cooking time.
exampleVi: Thiết bị mới trong bếp đã giảm đáng kể thời gian nấu ăn.

definition: the inner or indoor part of something, especially a building.
example: The interior design of the office creates a welcoming atmosphere for clients.
exampleVi: Thiết kế nội thất của văn phòng tạo ra một bầu không khí chào đón cho khách hàng.

definition: a piece of equipment or furniture that is fixed in place in a building.
example: The light fixture in the hallway needs to be replaced.
exampleVi: Thiết bị chiếu sáng trong hành lang cần được thay thế.

definition: the style and design of the interior of a room or building.
example: The decor of the restaurant reflects its cultural heritage.
exampleVi: Trang trí của nhà hàng phản ánh di sản văn hóa của nó.

definition: the process of improving a broken, damaged, or outdated structure.
example: The renovation of the old building will enhance its value.
exampleVi: Việc cải tạo tòa nhà cũ sẽ nâng cao giá trị của nó.

definition: the way in which the parts of something are arranged or organized.
example: The layout of the office maximizes productivity and collaboration.
exampleVi: Bố trí của văn phòng tối đa hóa năng suất và sự hợp tác.

definition: an additional item that enhances the functionality or appearance of something.
example: Adding some colorful accessories can brighten up the living space.
exampleVi: Thêm một số phụ kiện màu sắc có thể làm sáng không gian sống.

definition: a set of rooms forming an individual residence, typically in a building with multiple units.
example: She decided to rent a new apartment closer to her workplace.
exampleVi: Cô quyết định thuê một căn hộ mới gần nơi làm việc.

definition: material used to prevent the passage of heat, sound, or electricity.
example: Proper insulation can significantly reduce energy costs in a home.
exampleVi: Cách nhiệt đúng cách có thể giảm đáng kể chi phí năng lượng trong một ngôi nhà.

definition: a person who rents land, a building, or an apartment to a tenant.
example: The landlord is responsible for maintaining the property.
exampleVi: Chủ nhà có trách nhiệm bảo trì tài sản.

definition: a person who occupies land or property rented from a landlord.
example: The tenant must pay rent on time to avoid penalties.
exampleVi: Người thuê phải thanh toán tiền thuê đúng hạn để tránh bị phạt.

definition: to restore to a good state of repair.
example: They plan to renovate the historic building next year.
exampleVi: Họ dự định cải tạo tòa nhà lịch sử vào năm tới.
collocations: renovate a house, renovate a room

definition: the action or method of storing something for future use.
example: Adequate storage is essential in any home to keep it organized.
exampleVi: Lưu trữ đầy đủ là cần thiết trong bất kỳ ngôi nhà nào để giữ cho nó gọn gàng.

definition: the process of keeping something in good condition through regular checks and repairs.
example: Regular maintenance of appliances can extend their lifespan.
exampleVi: Bảo trì thường xuyên các thiết bị có thể kéo dài tuổi thọ của chúng.

definition: a person or company that undertakes a contract to provide materials or labor for construction.
example: The contractor will begin renovations next month.
exampleVi: Nhà thầu sẽ bắt đầu cải tạo vào tháng tới.

definition: a service provided to the public, such as water, electricity, or gas.
example: The utility bills can be quite high during the winter months.
exampleVi: Hóa đơn tiện ích có thể khá cao trong những tháng mùa đông.

definition: the system or process of providing warmth to a building.
example: The heating system needs to be serviced before winter arrives.
exampleVi: Hệ thống sưởi ấm cần được bảo trì trước khi mùa đông đến.

definition: A thin bed cloth used as a covering for a mattress or as a layer over the sleeper.
example: Use the sheets in the hall closet to make the bed.
exampleVi: Sử dụng ga trải giường trong tủ quần áo ở hành lang để làm giường.

definition: A board or table used to openly hold and display silver plate and other dishware; a sideboard; a buffet.
example: We need to understand the concept of cupboard.

definition: The shelf above a fireplace which may be also a structural support for the masonry of the chimney.
example: We need to understand the concept of mantel.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về lò sưởi.

definition: An accessible structure extending from a building, especially outside a window.
example: We need to understand the concept of balcony.

definition: A gallery, platform, or balcony, usually roofed and often partly enclosed, extending along the outside of a building.

definition: A brick, stone or cement floor to a fireplace or oven.
example: We need to understand the concept of hearth.

definition: An upright frame, typically on three legs, for displaying or supporting something, such as an artist's canvas.

definition: A chair with supports for the arms or elbows.

definition: A corridor in a building that connects rooms.

definition: The craft of making high-quality wooden furniture; cabinetmaking.
example: We need to understand the concept of cabinetry.

definition: An item of kitchen furniture, like a cabinet with shelves, for storing crockery or utensils.
example: We need to understand the concept of dresser.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về tủ quần áo.

definition: Couch grass, a species of persistent grass, Elymus repens, usually considered a weed.
example: We need to understand the concept of couch.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đi văng.

definition: An enclosed underground space, often under a building, used for storage or shelter.
example: We need to understand the concept of cellar.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hầm rượu.

definition: A paved outside area, adjoining a house, used for dining or recreation.
example: We need to understand the concept of patio.

definition: A small room, closet, or cabinet usually located in or near the kitchen, dedicated to shelf-stable food storage and/or storing kitchenware, like a larder, but smaller.
example: We need to understand the concept of pantry.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tủ đựng thức ăn.

definition: A curtain; a drapery.
example: We need to understand the concept of drapes.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về rèm.

definition: A pad on which a person can recline and sleep, usually having an inner section of coiled springs covered with foam or other cushioning material then enclosed with cloth fabric.
example: We need to understand the concept of mattress.

definition: A narrow hall or passage with rooms leading off it, as in a building or in a railway carriage.

definition: To travel by railway.

definition: A covered and enclosed entrance to a building, whether taken from the interior, and forming a sort of vestibule within the main wall, or projecting without and with a separate roof.

definition: An open hearth for holding a fire at the base of a chimney.

definition: A partial covering for a floor.
example: We need to understand the concept of rug.

definition: A branched, often ornate, lighting fixture suspended from the ceiling
example: We need to understand the concept of chandelier.

definition: A regularly-shaped slab of clay or other material, affixed to cover or decorate a surface, as in a roof-tile, glazed tile, stove tile, carpet tile etc.
example: We need to understand the concept of tile.

definition: A case of translucent or transparent material made to protect a flame, or light, used to illuminate its surroundings.

definition: The handrail on the side of a staircase.
example: We need to understand the concept of banister.

definition: (mostly in botany and forestry) The wood from any dicotyledonous tree, without regard to its hardness.
example: Balsa is a hardwood, but a soft hardwood.
exampleVi: Balsa là một loại gỗ cứng nhưng mềm.

definition: A lobby, corridor, or waiting room, used in a hotel, theater, etc.
example: We had a drink in the foyer waiting for the play to start.
exampleVi: Chúng tôi uống rượu ở tiền sảnh chờ vở kịch bắt đầu.

definition: A fixture for a light.
example: We need to understand the concept of sconce.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về đèn treo tường.

definition: Any raised flat surface that can be walked on: a balcony; a porch; a raised patio; a flat rooftop.
example: We need to understand the concept of deck.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bộ bài.

definition: An area, open to the sky, partially or wholly surrounded by walls or buildings.
example: She sat in the courtyard, enjoying the garden.
exampleVi: Cô ngồi trong sân, tận hưởng khu vườn.

definition: A doorlike structure outside a house.
example: We need to understand the concept of gate.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm cổng.

definition: An open space between woods.
example: We need to understand the concept of lawn.

definition: A box into which mail is put
example: We need to understand the concept of mailbox.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hộp thư.

definition: A thin artificial barrier that separates two pieces of land or a house perimeter.
example: We need to understand the concept of fence.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hàng rào.

definition: Herpes zoster, caused by Human herpes virus 3, in genus Varicellovirus.
example: We need to understand the concept of shingles.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bệnh zona.

definition: A prepared channel in a surface, especially at the side of a road adjacent to a curb, intended for the drainage of water.
example: We need to understand the concept of gutter.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm máng xối.

definition: Short private road that leads to a house or garage.
example: We need to understand the concept of driveway.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đường lái xe.

definition: (furniture) A piece of dining room furniture having drawers and shelves for linen and tableware; originally for serving food.
example: We need to understand the concept of sideboard.

definition: One who lounges; an idler.
example: We need to understand the concept of lounger.

definition: A dense clump of grass or vegetation; a tussock.
example: We need to understand the concept of hassock.

definition: A sideboard or buffet.
example: We need to understand the concept of credenza.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về credenza.

definition: Cloth draped gracefully in folds.
example: We need to understand the concept of drapery.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về rèm cửa.

definition: A low stool for supporting the feet while seated.
example: We need to understand the concept of footstool.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu rõ khái niệm ghế đẩu.

definition: A device used to store hats upon. Usually made of wood and standing at least five foot tall, they have a single pole making up most of the height, with a sturdy base to prevent toppling, and an array of lengthy pegs at the top for placement of hats.
example: We need to understand the concept of hatstand.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về giá đỡ mũ.
